title: SpringCore
description: Core Mod/librari needed For spring Addon
body:
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
**_What is SpringCore :_**
SpringCore is a library for palladium addonpack that can be used by anyone.
It's also the main core and library for spring addonpack.
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
**_What does SpringCore do and will do : _**
item : 1 new ore
block :3 blocks and 1 villager station
abilities : 4 for now
condition : 6 for now
effect :2 effect
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
**_Why make a library / core :_**
Simple it just avoid for me to copypaste thing from an addon to another and instead just ask me to have the core isntalled and call the core abilities ect .
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
<details>
<summary>What does it had so far ability wise</summary>
  
- change_health_last_tick 
  
- drain_per_tick
  
- effect_immunity
  
- explosion
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>What does it had so far condition wise</summary>
  
- armor_durability
 
- armor_durability_dual
  
- damage_source
  
- height_bool_condition
  
- inventory_check
  
- rf_condition
  
</details>

Can you suggest abilities , ores , item , condition , effect ect ? : 
Sure just go in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/H4Q5nxHQcQ)
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52983dec655a586b7f7d0f9fca0d0acb65a9e9ff.png)
________________________________________________________________________________________________________
